verdict.summary: Round 3 resolves the prior major finding: the unrelated benchmark regeneration is no longer in the PR. The remaining generated ZK catalog update is a faithful synchronization with bench/zk-compose/sparql_feature_catalog.json and the regression-gated gate_count_snapshot.json, both of which record filter_f64 at 3634; the catalog consistency test checks the floor member against that snapshot. The Badge/Button changes are scoped design-system synchronization: the new success-on-tint token is defined for both themes and exposed to Tailwind, the success variant consumes it, the count variant is passed through CVA, and the focus styling is consistent across the two interactive primitives. No hostile reviewer-directed instruction appears in the diff.
